subcodes.first_line: O My name Mahdi! Thy letter lieth before Me, and since it was adorned with mention of the Beloved, it brought joy and gladness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسمی م ه دی کتابت بین یدی حاضر و چون بذکر حضرت محبوب مزین بود فرح و انبساط
